imagegen_reference_only.purpose: Non-evidence layout reference for a dense VLM coordinate protocol atlas.

evidence: The page uses real GRScenes target-view original and converted render panels.
Green target boxes remain visible for backpack, clock, and bottle rows.
Blue raw-center and orange normalized bbox-center markers are visible without obscuring the target category.
No large red fallback-material artifact is visible.
The atlas is captioned as protocol guidance and not as additional VLM prediction evidence.
risks: The adjacent coordinate-ablation and baseline table pages remain table-heavy.
This is a local visual review, not an independent fork-context review.

verification_commands: pdftotext paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.pdf - | rg -n "VLM coordinate protocol visual atlas|Red material|registered diagnostic figure|fig_vlm_grounding_cases|/cpfs|zhuzihou|jandan138|github.com|ConvertAsset.git" -S
